parsed.generic_mechanism: An opening shifts belief when it causally reassigns each apparent payoff; cataloguing payoffs while postponing their tests can make freedom attractive without yet making the behavior seem valueless.

paraphrased_evidence.A: The sequence establishes autonomy, limits the target, and exposes learned expectations, but it mostly inventories supposed rewards and defers testing whether the behavior supplies them; the reader is invited to doubt more than shown why to disbelieve.
paraphrased_evidence.B: The block reattributes pleasure to relief of a self-created urge, conditioning, and failed satisfaction, then explains why restraint preserves desire. These mechanisms attack benefit, though extreme comparisons, sweeping factual claims, and a broad target may repel a skeptical reader.

paraphrased_evidence.ours: The sequence establishes autonomy, limits the target, and exposes learned expectations, but it mostly inventories supposed rewards and defers testing whether the behavior supplies them; the reader is invited to doubt more than shown why to disbelieve.
paraphrased_evidence.ref: The block reattributes pleasure to relief of a self-created urge, conditioning, and failed satisfaction, then explains why restraint preserves desire. These mechanisms attack benefit, though extreme comparisons, sweeping factual claims, and a broad target may repel a skeptical reader.
